Event: Mushroom Loot - December 2025
Event Date: 02/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: B48
Twilight Feather Bow

When attacking, has a [21%-23%] chance of dealing (80%-95%] damage to a group of enemies.
When attacking, the unit has a 65% chance to fire an arrow at a random enemy unit. When the arrow hits, it frightens the target and all enemy units in a small radius around it for 3 sec. When the fear effect ends, the enemy unit explodes and deals 280000 physical damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
